macro.title: Even as GSEs step into MBS market, macro forces are controlling mortgage rates
macro.what: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac have been active in the mortgage-backed securities market in recent weeks — but their approach appears more measured and opportunistic than many initially expected
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Market Jitters Drive Mortgage Rates Up, Sending Some Would-Be Homebuyers to the Sidelines
macro.what: Higher housing costs, along with economic uncertainty that comes with the Iran war, are causing some house hunters to think twice
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Redfin Economists’ Weekly Take: Iran War Drives Rate Volatility
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: The Iran War continues to fuel market volatility as it enters its fourth week, particularly as the White House signals it is seeking a resolution
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Florida: In choppy 2026, one state is many homebuilding markets
housing.what: Southwest Florida metros saw the steepest drops in 2025, led by Punta Gorda at -11.93%, as insurance and inventory weigh on demand
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: BuildersUpdate pay-at-closing model targets builders’ marketing risk
housing.what: BuildersUpdate.com has rolled out a “pay upon performance” model that shifts new-home marketing costs from upfront spend to a flat fee due only when a sale closes, aiming squarely at builders’ growing concern over wasted lead-gen dollars in a choppy demand and rate environment
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Florida court shields unused reverse mortgage credit from garnishment
housing.what: Appeals court rules creditors cannot garnish undisbursed HECM line of credit funds under Florida homestead exemption.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: CoStar says Zillow copyright infringement now tops 53,000 photos
housing.what: CoStar amended its Zillow lawsuit, alleging infringement of 53,000+ watermarked photos across Zillow and syndication partners.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: 14% of Home-Sale Agreements Fell Through Last Month–A Record for February
housing.what: House hunters have the upper hand, allowing them to abandon deals over price, repairs or second thoughts
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: U.S. Home Prices Barely Budged in February
housing.what: Home prices rose 0.1% month over month on a seasonally adjusted basis—the slowest growth in seven months
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: There Are 630,000 More Home Sellers Than Buyers—the Biggest Gap on Record
housing.what: When sellers outnumber buyers, the buyers who are in the market have bargaining power
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: February’s $30M+ Home Sales Cluster in Florida and NYC—Including Two in the Same Barrier Island Enclave
housing.what: Florida and New York dominated February’s ultra-luxury housing market, with oceanfront estates and Central Park condos going for more than $50 million
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
